🌆 Market News Digest
[Jul 23, 2026 EST]

🔥 Top Stories
• U.S.-Iran escalation drives oil spike — Trump says he’s close to a “massive attack”; Brent tops $100, WTI jumps 6.2%, Red Sea/Hormuz shipping risk intensifies
• ECB holds rates, turns more hawkish on inflation risk — deposit rate left at 2.25%; Lagarde says energy shock may keep inflation above target into 1H 2027
• Intel crushes estimates, lifts capex — Q2 revenue $16.13B vs $14.43B est.; Q3 guide above views; 2026 capex raised to $20B, shares surge ~11%

⛽ Oil & Energy
• OPEC+ seen raising Sept output quotas by ~188k bpd; Russia weighs longer fuel export bans as supply risks stay elevated
• Iran/Red Sea fallout widens: attacks/explosions reported across Kuwait, Qeshm and Larak; IMO condemns shipping attacks, Saudi security warnings issued
• EIA: U.S. natgas storage +32 Bcf vs +34 est.; oil/gas inflation pressure remains the macro focus

📊 Markets & Macro
• U.S. 10Y yield breaks 4.70% for first time since Jan 2025; mortgage rates rise to 6.58%, the highest since Aug 2025
• U.S. jobless claims surprise lower at 187k vs 210k est.; Chicago Fed and Kansas City Fed gauges stay mixed
• Stocks sell off on AI spend fears + geopolitics: Nasdaq 100 down sharply; Alphabet and Tesla lead mega-cap losses

🌍 Geopolitical
• Trump and Iran trade fresh threats; Iran says U.S. bases are legitimate targets, while Senate blocks war-powers restraint and House passes Iran war-powers resolution
• Kuwait says air defenses are intercepting missiles/drones after “Iranian aggression”; reports also flag Black Sea tanker attacks and Ukraine port strikes
• Israel, Saudi and Gulf tensions escalate as security alerts rise and China warns citizens in Saudi Arabia

🪙 Crypto & DeFi
• Coinbase-backed tokenization push expands as Mubadala joins onchain fund; institutions launch Bitcoin Security Consortium with $15M pledge
• Bitcoin/ETH social chatter hits 12-month lows despite institutional activity; Goldman CEO urges passage of crypto clarity bill
• XAI launches Grok 4.5 across major platforms

🏛️ Regulatory & Policy
• USTR says EU DMA and other actions threaten U.S. exports; U.S. tees up new tariff announcement while Canada warns all options are on the table
• U.S. auto safety regulators start drafting new door-safety rules after fatal EV entrapment cases
• SEC schedules a Sept. 17 roundtable on 24-hour trading; Treasury again refrains from naming any currency manipulator

🏢 Corporate
